case_title: JUDY YANG HAO HU VS. JOSEPH G YICK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED AUG-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YICK, JOSEPH G
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVER) SERVED AUG-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YICK, JOSEPH G
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF JUDY YANG HAO HU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. DEFENDANT JOSEPH YICK IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY HU, JUDY YANG HAO AS TO DEFENDANT YICK, JOSEPH G ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY YANG HAO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER KARIN LIAO. THE CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS SWORN IN WITH THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. THE CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER, AIDON NI. DEFENDANT JOSEPH G. YICK IS PRESENT. PER THE PLAINTIFF, THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOVEMBER 16TH HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HU, JUDY YANG HAO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
RECEIVED LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF REQUESTING CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR NEXT HEARING. VERIFIED THAT INTERPRETER'S OFFICE HAS BEEN NOTIFIED RE ASSIGNEMENT OF CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR THIS MATTER.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, JUDY YANG HAO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YICK, JOSEPH G DEFENDANT HAS PAID $1094.60 OF THE $2000.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO A FURTHER REFUND IN LIGHT OF THE DAMAGE TO THE APARTMENT THAT DEFENDANT SUBSTANTIATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
